style_effects: Gentle streams of iridescent water droplets cling to Nidoking's smooth, pearl-like skin, drifting upward in slow, shimmering spirals. A soft, cool blue aura pulses gently around its body, radiating ripples of light that mimic calm ocean depths, with submerged bubbles rising in delicate, translucent trails. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
